ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2020 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan N. Vaknin, Esq. appeared specially for Plaintiff. Cass is dimissed without prejudice at request of plaintiff's counsel. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2019 Continued To Dec-31-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth B. Tsang, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Dec-31-2020 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Continued To Oct-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Alisa Kim, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-29-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Continued To Sep-10-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to SEP-10-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: GARRET L. WONG; Clerk: Maria Olopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)
